---
title: "Calculator: Texas hold-em poker odds"
author: Tom Coleman
format: html
abstract-title: Summary
abstract: A calculator to provide the number of combinations and permutations for two integers.
draft: true
---

```{r, setup, include = FALSE}
library("webexercises")
```


```{=html}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Poker Odds Calculator</title>
<style>
body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#f5f5f5;padding:20px}
.container{max-width:1200px;margin:auto}
.row{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.08);margin-bottom:1rem}
.header{background:#3F68B6;color:#fff;padding:.75rem 1rem;font-weight:bold}
.body{padding:1rem}
.params{flex:1;min-width:280px}
.main{flex:2;min-width:500px}
select,button{margin:2px;padding:4px}
.stat{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:bold}
.playing{display:inline-block;border:1px solid #333;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;width:42px;text-align:center;background:white;margin:2px}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container">
<div class="row">
<div class="card params">
<div class="header">Parameters</div>
<div class="body">
<div id="selectors"></div>
<button onclick="calculate()">Calculate Odds</button>
</div></div>

<div class="card main">
<div class="header">Poker Table</div>
<div class="body">
<div><b>Hero</b>: <span id="heroCards"></span></div>
<br>
<div><b>Board</b>: <span id="boardCards"></span></div>
</div></div>
</div>

<div class="card">
<div class="header">Odds</div>
<div class="body">
<div class="stat" id="win">Win: --</div>
<div class="stat" id="tie">Tie: --</div>
<div class="stat" id="lose">Lose: --</div>
</div></div>
</div>

<script>
const ranks="23456789TJQKA".split("");
const suits=["♠","♥","♦","♣"];
const cards=[];
for(const r of ranks) for(const s of suits) cards.push(r+s);

const ids=["h1","h2","f1","f2","f3","turn","river"];
const selDiv=document.getElementById("selectors");

ids.forEach(id=>{
 let label=document.createElement("div");
 label.innerHTML="<b>"+id+"</b>";
 let s=document.createElement("select");
 s.id=id;
 let o=document.createElement("option");
 o.value=""; o.text="--";
 s.appendChild(o);
 cards.forEach(c=>{
   let op=document.createElement("option");
   op.value=c; op.text=c;
   s.appendChild(op);
 });
 label.appendChild(s);
 selDiv.appendChild(label);
});

function renderCards(){
 document.getElementById("heroCards").innerHTML=[h1.value,h2.value].filter(Boolean).map(cardHTML).join("");
 document.getElementById("boardCards").innerHTML=[f1.value,f2.value,f3.value,turn.value,river.value].filter(Boolean).map(cardHTML).join("");
}
document.querySelectorAll("select").forEach(s=>s.addEventListener("change",renderCards));
function cardHTML(c){return `<span class="playing">${c}</span>`;}

function deckWithout(used){return cards.filter(c=>!used.includes(c));}

function rankVal(r){return "--23456789TJQKA".indexOf(r);}

function score7(hand){
 let rs=hand.map(c=>rankVal(c[0])).sort((a,b)=>b-a);
 let counts={}; rs.forEach(r=>counts[r]=(counts[r]||0)+1);
 let groups=Object.entries(counts).map(([r,c])=>[+r,c]).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]||b[0]-a[0]);
 return groups.map(g=>String(g[1])+":"+g[0]).join("|")+":"+rs.join(",");
}

function calculate(){
 renderCards();
 let hero=[h1.value,h2.value];
 if(hero.includes("")){alert("Choose hero cards");return;}
 let board=[f1.value,f2.value,f3.value,turn.value,river.value].filter(Boolean);
 let used=[...hero,...board];
 if(new Set(used).size!==used.length){alert("Duplicate cards selected");return;}

 let wins=0,ties=0,losses=0,trials=20000;

 for(let t=0;t<trials;t++){
   let deck=deckWithout(used).sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);

   let b=[...board];
   while(b.length<5) b.push(deck.pop());

   let opp1=[deck.pop(),deck.pop()];
   let opp2=[deck.pop(),deck.pop()];

   let heroScore=score7([...hero,...b]);
   let s1=score7([...opp1,...b]);
   let s2=score7([...opp2,...b]);

   let arr=[heroScore,s1,s2].sort().reverse();
   if(heroScore===arr[0]){
      let n=[heroScore,s1,s2].filter(x=>x===heroScore).length;
      if(n===1) wins++;
      else ties++;
   } else losses++;
 }

 document.getElementById("win").textContent="Win: "+(100*wins/trials).toFixed(1)+"%";
 document.getElementById("tie").textContent="Tie: "+(100*ties/trials).toFixed(1)+"%";
 document.getElementById("lose").textContent="Lose: "+(100*losses/trials).toFixed(1)+"%";
}
</script>
</body>
</html>

```


## Version history {-}

v1.0: initial version created 06/26 by tdhc.
  
[This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1)
